cases.name: figure-direct
cases.prompt: /nature-workflow Use Python to create a Nature-style multi-panel figure from these benchmark results.

cases.name: polishing-direct
cases.prompt: /nature-workflow Polish this abstract in Nature Communications style without changing the claims.

cases.name: writing-direct
cases.prompt: /nature-workflow Draft a Nature-style introduction from these novelty and result notes.

cases.name: reviewer-direct
cases.prompt: /nature-workflow Simulate a Nature-style reviewer critique for this draft before submission.

cases.name: citation-direct
cases.prompt: /nature-workflow Add Nature/CNS-family citation support to these manuscript claims and export RIS.

cases.name: data-direct
cases.prompt: /nature-workflow Draft a Nature Data Availability statement and repository plan for this manuscript.

cases.name: reader-direct
cases.prompt: /nature-workflow Build a full-paper bilingual Markdown reader with source anchors for this PDF.

cases.name: response-direct
cases.prompt: /nature-workflow Draft a point-by-point reviewer response letter for this Nature-family major revision.

cases.name: paper2ppt-direct
cases.prompt: /nature-workflow Turn this paper into a Chinese journal-club PPT in Nature style.

cases.name: academic-search-direct
cases.prompt: /nature-workflow Run a Nature-focused academic search, verify DOI metadata, and prepare reference exports.

cases.name: figure-fallback
cases.prompt: /nature-workflow Make a Nature figure from this table, but assume upstream nature-skills is not installed.
